summary: Frontend-only LUMYO landing site fully tested. All 5 routes (/, /solutions, /case-studies, /studio, /contact) load correctly. All required data-testids exist. Hero headline, 4 feature cards, service cards, OUR SOLUTIONS, DESIGN UNIQUE section, footer with CTA and comercial@lumyo.pt all render. Contact form submit shows contact-success. Hero-cta and footer-cta navigate to /contact. Mobile menu toggle opens mobile-menu with 5 links. Active nav highlighting works (magenta + 'active' class).

issues: React Router v6 future-flag warnings in console (non-blocking) - can opt-in to v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: consider adding React Router future flags to silence console warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only static site. Testids verified: nav-{home,solutions,case-studies,studio,contact}, hero-cta, footer-cta, menu-toggle, mobile-menu, input-{name,email,service,message}, contact-submit, contact-success. Solutions cards use solution-detail-{n}, case studies use case-{i} and stat-{l}, studio uses process-{n} and value-{v}.
